title: Mossel Bay's top Ironman athlete to compete in Gqeberha this month
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local triathlete Bonga...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local triathlete Bonga Nkqintiza will be competing in the Isuzu Ironman South Africa African Championship in Gqeberha on 30 March.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local triathlete Bonga Nkqintiza will be competing in the Isuzu Ironman South Africa African Championship in Gqeberha on 30 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He will be teaming up with former professional triathlete and multiple champion Matt Trautman, who is now his coach, and Paul Ingpen, Triathlon magazine editor and Cape Tri Series founder, to raise funds for various charities across South Africa under the Ironman4theKids celebrity teams banner.","html":"He will be teaming up with former professional triathlete and multiple champion Matt Trautman, who is now his coach, and Paul Ingpen, Triathlon magazine editor and Cape Tri Series founder, to raise funds for various charities across South Africa under the Ironman4theKids celebrity teams banner."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The 30 March triathlon consists of a 3.9km swim, 180.2km cycle and a 42.2km run."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nkqintiza, who was the first Mossel Bay resident to cross the Ironman 70.3 triathlon finish line in 2023, came 46th overall that year, in a time of 4:50:48.","html":"Nkqintiza, who was the first Mossel Bay resident to cross the Ironman 70.3 triathlon finish line in 2023, came 46th overall that year, in a time of 4:50:48."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In November 2024, the third year the Ironman 70.3 was held in Mossel Bay, Nkqintiza came 23rd overall and finished in 4:41:47.","html":"In November 2024, the third year the Ironman 70.3 was held in Mossel Bay, Nkqintiza came 23rd overall and finished in 4:41:47."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nkqintiza has about 10 challenges he has lined up to compete in this year. These are national and international contests."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To assist Nkqintiza in his challenges, go to www.backabuddy.co.za/campaign/be-part-of-my-triathlon-journey.He says: \"I am forever grateful to my current partners and sponsors. As I grow in my sport, they have been an integral part of my journey.","html":"To assist Nkqintiza in his challenges, go to www.backabuddy.co.za/campaign/be-part-of-my-triathlon-journey.
He says: \"I am forever grateful to my current partners and sponsors. As I grow in my sport, they have been an integral part of my journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"My mission is to elevate my performance and inspire others by competing at the highest level in triathlon and duathlon.\"","html":"\"My mission is to elevate my performance and inspire others by competing at the highest level in triathlon and duathlon.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bonga competing in the Ironman in Mossel Bay in 2023.BELOW: Bonga with (left) Mossel Bay Tourism chief operating officer Lieschke Steven-Jennings and community and youth developer Andrea Bradfield.","html":"Bonga competing in the Ironman in Mossel Bay in 2023.
BELOW: Bonga with (left) Mossel Bay Tourism chief operating officer Lieschke Steven-Jennings and community and youth developer Andrea Bradfield.

"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
